meaning: adj.强制的,强迫的,由强迫产生的,禁不住的
examples: She went through periods of compulsive overeating.
The Chinese manual adds to the controversy over whether compulsive internet use should be officially viewed as a mental disorder.
Her new series is compulsive viewing.
My ex-husband, a stock broker, was a compulsive gambler who lost a fortune of my inheritance.
He is a compulsive talker, his incessant conversational stream tracking the course of his volatile emotions.
